title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. meppelense
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. meppelense is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, which is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. meppelense include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
